property_hints.entity_id: Canonical name of the entity. Use for identity queries and exact matches.
property_hints.entity_type: Classification of the entity. Allowed values: machine, service, tool, config, network, concept, person, data, artifact, other.
property_hints.description: Human-readable summary of the entity. Use for descriptive queries.
property_hints.note_timestamp: Authorship timestamp in format YYMMDD-hhmm. Use for display only.
property_hints.note_timestamp_epoch: Unix epoch integer of authorship time. Use for time-based comparisons and sorting.
property_hints.note_role: Author of the source note. Values: hieu, claude.ai.
property_hints.text: Raw chunk text. Present on :Chunk nodes only. Use for content searches.
property_hints.filename_stem: Filename without .md extension. Present on :Document nodes. Use for link resolution queries.
property_hints.status: Document node status. Values: ingested, placeholder. Use to find unresolved links.
property_hints.content: Full file content. Present on :Document nodes with status ingested only.
